final:
module top_module
(
    input clk,
    input sload,
    input [7:0] load_val,
    output reg [7:0] count
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt)
    if (sload) begin
        count <= load_val;
    end else begin
        count <= count - 1;
    end
endmodule
